meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: Harmonic Drive Demo
items.short_description: An arcade-style rhythm game featuring full AI generated EDM. Build combos, chase perfect runs, climb the leaderboards, and experience a soundtrack built for late-night sessions and score chasing.

items.title: Cat Hits the Deck Demo
items.short_description: Deckbuilder roguelike about a cat that fears being hurt but has only cards that hurt her before enemies! Min-max your resources, get OverPowered cards in your paw, and build an unlosable Deck that prolly gonna kill you 9 times^^

items.title: Star Wrath Demo
items.short_description: 《Star Wrath》是一款多人太空夺宝动作游戏。游戏中，你需要设计自己的飞船，并与其他玩家在激烈的PvP和PvE战斗中争夺资源。

items.title: 十日梦
items.short_description: 《十日梦》是一款第一人称心理恐怖游戏。你被困在封闭空间陷入十日轮回，每日寻找随机出现的诡异环境异常，通过开枪或睡觉做出抉择，分辨梦境与现实，一步步揭开轮回背后的真相。

items.title: BrainMess Demo
items.short_description: You've been locked in a room with pen, paper, pins, and strings, and you're not leaving until it makes sense.

items.title: Parting Shadows Demo
items.short_description: A narrative RPG where every choice reshapes the story. Build your party from 56 unique classes, fight through three branching tales of mystery and betrayal, and discover that some paths can't be retraced.

items.title: 暗层 Demo
items.short_description: 一款档案调查类悬疑游戏。玩家将在一套异常档案管理系统中浏览案件记录、筛选线索、比对矛盾信息，并根据调查结果判断事件真相。试玩版包含前三个案件，展示档案阅读、线索推理和多结局判定等核心玩法。

items.title: Break, Then Upgrade Demo
items.short_description: 一个简单的增量游戏。在海底向漂浮物发射弹幕，获取战利品，升级！！！

items.title: Situation Normal Demo
items.short_description: 一款节奏由玩家掌控的高速混乱 2.5D 动作平台游戏。向后开火进行冲刺、即时切换武器，在一个会因您的每个决定不断升级的动态地下设施中杀出重围。

items.title: 失落城堡2
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 6,873 篇用户评测中有 77% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
items.short_description: 失落城堡2是一款2D卡通横版Rogue-Lite游戏。探寻丰富宝物道具强化自己，精通各类武器玩出花样，挑战强大魔物展现实力。新的冒险正召唤着宝藏猎人们！

items.title: BlackColled Madala Force 2
items.short_description: BlackColled MF2 brings Fictional WW3 Scenario to gamers with 10 maps and dozens of operators. Play with bots or other players through many locations across the world and unlock different operators from various fractions.

items.title: Chiggas - Survival of the Mitiest Demo
items.short_description: Survive the swarm, recruit Chigga Soldiers, unlock wild powerups, and fight through chaotic stages in Chiggas: Survival of the Mitiest, a fast arcade survival game packed with weapons, boosts, bosses, and Legendary Chigga Wear.

items.title: 我的英雄旅团 Demo
items.short_description: On the fantastical continent of Elfar, where swords and magic reign, you will establish and grow your own guild, leading members to accept quests, challenge dungeons, forge equipment, participate in competitions, and gradually uncover the secrets of the nine sacred sites

items.title: 魔女工厂 试玩版
items.short_description: 还款期限30分钟。一场在债务地狱中展开的疯狂工厂建设游戏。通过合约扭曲规则，突破荒谬的业绩指标。

items.title: 梦境搁浅 (Dreamstranded)
items.short_description: 沉浸在一个惬意的世界中，享受采集、制作、建造以及经营自己的旅店！

items.title: 魔鼠克星
items.short_description: 老鼠驱灵！？软萌治愈的像素风奇幻故事！

items.title: Dream Corp Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款融合建造、经营、生活类的公司模拟游戏，在游戏里你将操控老板的角色，没有繁琐的页面操作，你将精准操控每个角色，处理随机事件的同时，你可以发现每一名女员工的爱好、囧事、优美舞姿。也可以挖掘每一名男员工的生活状态、情绪状态以及家庭配偶关系，游戏中每个员工都有不同的性格。他们将共同与你一起成就一家梦想公司。

items.title: FERALPALS Demo: Chapter 1
items.short_description: 《兽化宠伴》是一款以吉祥物为主题的章节体恐怖游戏。人类因源自友好宠伴的病原体彻底灭亡。友好宠伴是基因工程生物，被植入了类人智慧，以满足人类的各种野心。如今，人类早已绝迹，遗留在世上的宠伴仍在复刻着创造者的社会形态。

items.title: Hammer Dongers Demo
items.short_description: The ultimate local multiplayer party game with destroyable terrain. It supports one player on keyboard and up to 4 on controller. Top down perspective and charming cartoony pixel art. Join the mayhem and beat your friends in the most creative ways possible!

items.title: Doo 'N' Dash
items.short_description: They closed the loo? Time to make a stinky poo! Play as Loo‑is in this Stealth N' Stench adventure. Hide, run, and use office receptacles to do your business. Relieve the pressure before it’s too late, or you might meet a truly stinky fate!

items.title: Billionaire MAX
items.short_description: 《Billionaire MAX》是一款最多支持4人在线对战的股票投资桌游。买卖21家虚构企业的股票，以及黄金、原油、房地产等大宗商品，应对50多种撼动世界经济的事件卡，抢先获得奖杯者获胜。精通特别分红、做空、奖杯加成等多样战略，决定胜负。配备贴心的新手教程，10分钟即可上手。完整支持日语、英语、简体中文、韩语。可在线对战，也可挑战4档难度CPU对手。

items.title: 最佳球会Online
items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 21% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在《最佳球会Online》中，你可以亲手打造专属豪华球队阵容。游戏门槛低、操作简单易上手，轻松操控即可畅享纯粹的足球乐趣。游戏活动紧跟赛事资讯，球员动态即时更新，《最佳球会Online》将为你带来沉浸式的足球游玩体验。

items.title: Team Disorder Demo
items.short_description: Team Disorder Demo is an intro into the full game. This adventure includes one large map with many exciting missions and things to find!

items.title: Ascension Clicker
items.short_description: A simple clicker game to pass the time! Can you break the game with your clicking power? Click to upgrade, upgrade to prestige, prestige to ascend, ascend to the end. Buy special upgrades, boosts and even minor automation to help you along your journey.

items.title: Tile Rogue Demo
items.short_description: 在方块的世界中展开冒险的休闲解谜动作游戏！ 为了不被巨大的敌人吞噬，破坏方块并开辟道路，向着终点前进！ 支持最多4人的在线多人模式！和朋友一起踏上色彩缤纷的大冒险吧！！

items.title: Star-Coat Demo
items.short_description: Embark on a quest to collect remnants of dead gods and save the universe from freezing over. Master nimble combat as a pilot and when things get dire, call on your COAT for help. Fight, explore, and loot to create the ultimate hero of the Stars.

items.title: Asymptote Demo
items.short_description: A 2D top-down rescue-survival game set on Mars, where you pilot an anti-gravity craft, save stranded colonists, destroy hostile machines, and face unpredictable encounters shaped by upgrades, unique tools, story choices and mysterious game mechanisms.

items.title: Goblin Attack Demo
items.short_description: 射击哥布林，壮大你的军队，并通过每一次点击保持速度。你可以全屏游玩，也可以在做其他事情时让游戏安静地运行在屏幕底部。

items.title: Overball Demo
items.short_description: Inspired by Pong, Overball reinvents the classic formula with explosive power-ups, destructible defenses, and a ball that grows more dangerous with every hit. Battle with up to 6 local players in fast-paced, frantic, and utterly chaotic matches.

items.title: Reel it! World Fishing
items.short_description: Embark on a fishing adventure around the world! Cast your line and reel in fish from across the globe!

items.title: Nia and The Abyss Demo
items.short_description: Nia and The Abyss is an Underwater Creature Collector, Cleanup, Farming, and Ecosystem Sim. Clean pollution, cultivate plants, attract and evolve marine life. Restoring balance to a responsive ocean.

items.title: Dustpocalypse: Demo
items.short_description: Play as a cute cat leading their trusty robo-vacuum into battle against endless waves of mutated dust monsters. Master working together with your robot friend, and experiment with different builds to finally achieve the perfect run. Will you be able to conquer the Dustpocalypse?

items.title: Mining and Dwarves Demo
items.short_description: Mining and Dwarves 是一款放置增量游戏：开采岩石、收集矿石并招募矮人。你可以主动释放强力技能冲刺收益，也可以放松下来，让矮人替你干活。

items.title: Elders K.O. Demo
items.short_description: 你和你的朋友们都变成老头老太太了！提好你的裤子，在最多支持8人在线对战的混乱迷你游戏中疯狂乱斗。体验第一人称近战，用一整套荒谬至极的武器道具制霸全场。温馨提示：本游戏制作过程中没有真正的老人受到伤害……好吧，其实有1个。

items.title: Bubble Balance Bonanza Demo
items.short_description: Roll, bump, jump, and crash your way through this fast-paced, marble style, physics-driven platformer. With fun environments, cute characters and crazy obstacles to overcome, you'll need to keep your balance to complete the journey! Are YOU ready for the bonanza?

items.title: 十个好人Ten Innocent People Demo
items.short_description: 对于这个已经坠入深渊的国家，义军仍然发出了“十人令”，给了它最后的机会。使者要如何布局他的行动才能挽回局面呢？本demo包含《十个好人》前八分之一的内容，这部分内容中使者将建立起他的基地和情报网，为寻找十个好人、避免乾国被净灭打下基础。Demo中包含一条重要的隐藏支线，你能找到那个蓝色眼睛的小伙子吗？

items.title: Mushrooms vs Engineers Demo
items.short_description: Mushrooms vs Engineers is a top-down arena shooter where you "The Engineer" battle the endless hordes of Mushrooms over 20 waves until you defeat the final boss of each area. Choose your own battles by upgrading the spawn rates of Mushrooms and using their spores to increase your own power.

items.title: Mouseman: Point and Click RPG Adventure Chapter 1 Demo
items.short_description: Noir-themed Point and Click RPG Adventure with Turn-based battles! Pickpocket innocent people, eat cheese, rumble with the C.A.T.S., uncover secrets and rise to the top of the criminal underworld to become Top G!

items.title: Moosio Demo
items.short_description: Moosio是一款混乱的派对格斗游戏，你将扮演驼鹿互相发射蘑菇！在竞技场周围收集蘑菇，在荒谬的战斗中向朋友们吐蘑菇。本地或在线游玩。纯粹的混乱。纯粹的驼鹿。纯粹的蘑菇狂欢！

items.title: Human Resources Demo
items.short_description: You work in Human Resources. In the demo of this dystopian document thriller, use your terminal to scrutinize records and expose human-like AI. Spot contradictions to detect the impostors. Efficiency is mandatory. Failure is unforgivable.

items.title: Invisible Ascent Demo
items.short_description: A rage-inducing memory platformer where the path disappears before you jump. Study the platforms, trust your memory, and climb upward one painful mistake at a time.

items.title: Averi the Accursed Demo
items.short_description: 被世人排斥的艾薇莉，成为了她那颗小小星球对抗暴君克罗夫勋爵与普索诺斯女士的最后希望。在这款充满动作感的 2D 像素风平台游戏中展开冒险吧。

items.title: Standard Human Pizza Demo
items.short_description: Make deadly pizzas to kill monsters. Standard Human Pizza is a horror-cooking sim where you serve monsters, survive anomalies, and use lethal ingredients to exterminate your clientele.

items.title: D.E.C.A.Y. Demo
items.short_description: 核战争后，美国被划分为危险的区域。你是 D.E.C.A.Y. 组织的一名孤独特工，负责控制一座偏远的掩体。探索废墟、获取资源、执行命令，并在一个濒临崩溃的世界中做出选择，决定何为秩序。

items.title: Splash monsters 1+2 Demo
items.short_description: This demo features some of the groovy levels included in the full game. Splash the monsters back to their own reality in style. Explore the elements of both games with monsters made of water and sand.

items.title: SCREAM you LOSE
items.short_description: If you get startled, you go back to Number 0. A Japanese-style horror anomaly-spotting game that uses your microphone to detect your reactions. Eerie shrines, schools, and cult-like locations await, filled with all kinds of horror and anomalies.

items.title: Discremental Demo
items.short_description: Discremental 是一款短篇放置与增量游戏，你主要升级你的圆盘，同时强化其他装备。

items.title: ARMORY SIMULATOR
items.short_description: Build, manage, and expand your very own armory, catering to cowboys, bounty hunters, and outlaws in search of the finest gear.

items.title: TOOSIN : 투신 Demo
items.short_description: Face an AI that evolves by learning your combat patterns in real time. TOOSIN is a roguelike game where you fight against enemies that analyze and counter your habits. Become the TOOSIN by creating your own build with a variety of perks, traits, weapons, and combos.

items.title: [Bober Bros] Last Pill Bar LEAKED Demo
items.short_description: 一款以选择驱动的调酒师模拟游戏。调制饮品，认识身陷困境的顾客，通过分支对话与酒吧游戏塑造他们的人生走向。不适合儿童或心理承受能力较弱者。

items.title: Sugar Shatter
items.short_description: Smash through your competition in Sugar Shatter, a brick breaker fighting game where you have to hit a candy ball to break more bricks than your opponent. Meet a variety of characters in campaign mode, or challenge your friends to a test of skill in versus mode with online or local multiplayer!

items.title: Word Rift
items.short_description: A fast-paced word puzzle game featuring handcrafted levels, speedruns, endless mode, and global leaderboards.

items.title: School Owner Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Build and run a secondary school from scratch. Plan classrooms and facilities, manage staff and daily schedules, support student development, and improve your school through stronger performance, better results, and growing reputation.

items.title: RWS
items.short_description: Rolling With Swords is a chaotic 2D arena brawler set in random levels. Chain attacks, roll through danger, and collect absurd power-ups in a tug-of-war system where control constantly shifts until one player claims the entire arena.

items.title: Eldread: Horrors of a Dark Moon Demo
items.short_description: Manage your dwindling oxygen levels and navigate a cosmic horror roguelite in a lunar colony. Confront nightmarish body-horror anomalies, survive unpredictable text-driven events, and endure the madness waiting beneath the dark moon.

items.title: Wool at the Gates
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款极简风格的基地战术防御游戏。你将扮演英雄亲自战斗，指挥单位，并创造强大的“职业”协同效果，在不断强化城市的同时，抵御无尽入侵的羊群浪潮。

items.title: Letter Lost
items.short_description: You’re the sole employee at the Kharnym Isle post office, stamping, sorting, and delivering mail. But the job hides secrets, and the office itself holds mysteries you must uncover. This will be the only job you’ll ever need to work… unless you can escape.

items.title: 最后一掷 试玩版
items.short_description: 撤离玩法的桌游，你需要不断思考、掷骰子、做选择。游戏的考验不在于战斗技巧，而在于决策、管理与策略。

items.title: Almost Out
items.short_description: Almost Out is a horror escape room simulator where you must escape a psycho while leaving no traces of your escape attempt.

items.title: Just Keep Fishing Demo
items.short_description: 一款关于钓很多鱼的短篇增量游戏。

items.title: Monstrobus Quiz Demo
items.short_description: Monstrobus Quiz is an online trivia game for 2-16 players! Answer questions and use tricks or boosts on yourself or others. Create custom question packs to keep each game session unique. Gather your friends and dive into the Monstrobus Quiz fun!

items.title: EVIDENCE Demo
items.short_description: EVIDENCE 是一款充满氛围感的 neo-noir 侦探惊悚游戏，你将扮演一名在腐败而疲惫的 Nova City Department 中工作的侦探。

items.title: Frustration Demo
items.short_description: A psychological detective game where your own memory sabotages the investigation. Solve murders, connect clues, and survive hallucinations before reality fully collapses.

items.title: Professional Cats Demo
items.short_description: Professional Cats 是一个温馨的迷你游戏合集，包含4种小游戏。穿着不同职业服装的猫咪将挑战你的观察力和记忆力。寻找、配对并整理它们，同时在全球排行榜中竞争！

items.title: Mouse X Demo
items.short_description: 你每天都在看着你的鼠标指针。用 Mouse X 来个性化它吧。在桌面上使用自定义动态光标，并在 Steam Workshop 上分享你自己的自定义光标皮肤！

items.title: Orbital Challenge
items.short_description: 在这个快节奏的物理平台游戏中，翻滚、跳跃和传送，挑战 10 个关卡！在全球排行榜中争夺最快通关时间！

items.title: The Tragedy at Deer Creek
items.short_description: A cinematic point-and-click adventure where you step into the shoes of photographer Charlotte Gray as she explores the abandoned camp of Deer Creek and uncovers the tragedy that befell the camp and its people.

items.title: Silky Road Demo
items.short_description: 选配独一无二的车厢组建你的列车，迎击一波波来袭的敌人，搜刮战利品并升级你的配置。在这款集自动战斗、列车防守、战略与放置挂机机理于一体的休闲游戏中不断变强。

items.title: Cosmic Carl Demo
items.short_description: The only things between Carl the Alien and the cold, uncaring vacuum of space are his rubbery forcefield, and a powerful rocket placed precariously on his back. Try not to kill Carl as you rocket, bounce, and orbit your way through fast paced, short levels with wacky physics.

items.title: Slay The Saxons Demo
items.short_description: Slay The Saxons is a fast-paced, tactical rogue-lite game played on an isometric grid. Command a warband of Viking heroes, each with unique abilities, against endless waves of Saxons. Position your shield wall, shove enemies into hazards, and master the grid to survive against overwhelming odds.

items.title: 节奏狂怒
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 29 篇用户评测中有 79% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《节奏狂怒》是一款融合了弹幕射击要素的节奏音乐游戏，用你的吉他武装自己，和愤怒的音符激情碰撞，把和平重新带回音乐世界，体验手指发麻的快感。

items.title: The Disclosure Loop
items.short_description: The city is in chaos. The building won't let you leave. A first-person horror experience built on paranoia, anomalies, and alien frequencies. Out June 10, 2026.

items.title: Cosmist Demo
items.short_description: 在这款街机风格的策略游戏中征服银河！选择并指挥你的将领，派遣舰队前往遥远的星区，开采稀有资源，打造强大的升级。 但请小心——古老的神祇或许会插手，改变你的命运。

items.title: Apocalypse Express
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 154 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在后末日的背景中，抵御敌人无休止的进攻浪潮，对你的火车进行控制、升级和修理。在这款动作策略类肉鸽游戏中，玩家决定踏上穿越荒原的旅程，以期实现亲眼看一看外界遗迹的梦想。

items.title: Please Ignore The Anomalies
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game about observing strange anomalies, surviving disturbing entities, and trying to make it to work on time. Sometimes the house is completely normal... sometimes it is not.

items.title: Kamilia
items.short_description: Kamilia 是一款以剧情为驱动、强调玩家选择的侦探悬疑游戏。扮演一位才华横溢的画家，在一起多年来未解的案件中揭开被尘封的真相。

items.title: The Dreams in the Peacock House
items.short_description: Wake up from a never-ending slumber and find your lost dreams in the shadows of the Peacock House.

items.title: Hostage Down
items.short_description: 在这个人质模拟中，拿起麦克风并协商赎金以释放人质。借助先进的人工智能和完全的选择自由，利用你的魅力、叙事决策和说服力来操纵不可预测的情况。每句话都很重要，而且可能要付出高昂的代价。

items.title: Fears to Fathom® - Scratch Creek
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 555 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在注意到与《Fears to Fathom》某个篇章有毛骨悚然的相似之处后，泰莎与马库斯决定分享他们自己的经历。斯克拉奇溪仅支持线上双人合作模式。

items.title: ICU - Intensive Care Unit 8 Demo
items.short_description: ICU – Intensive Care Unit 8 是一款单人恐怖游戏，主角被困在不断循环的走廊中，必须发现异常现象才能找到出口

items.title: Battlements Demo
items.short_description: Pirate ships, fortresses, and cannons! Battlements is an arcade reimagining of the "Rampart" classic. Defend the peaceful nation of Marinia from the dreaded Crimson Waves Empire - build walls, set up cannons, bombard the enemy! Control the fight with upgrades and special cards!

items.title: 时空迷踪
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
items.short_description: 与夏洛克·福尔摩斯和华生博士一同踏上旅程，在这场惊喜不断的“弹性”点击式冒险中自由探索吧。 尽情动动鼠标，抓取、拖拽并释放，协助他们破解这场充满幽默与“元时间”之旅的离奇悬案！

items.title: 难道你是GAL高手 Demo
items.short_description: 玩了多年游戏还是负KD的无口少女、顶级水平却不擅长画大雷的美少女画师，想打一辈子旮旯的富家千金、努力理解二次元为何物的现充妹妹——玩家将成为她们的男主，在名为“掐楼之家”的周边店里一同努力让店铺爆火，感情逐渐升温...废萌恋爱作、堂堂连载！

items.title: Lost Carcossa
items.short_description: Ascend the great tower, Babel, in this rogue-like to confront the tyrannical King in Yellow. Plan your moves in Turn-Based combat to ensure your victory and become stronger. Perhaps even recruiting new allies along the way.

items.title: Gambillion Demo
items.short_description: The house always wins, but they don't know you've still got a spare kidney. Bet big, drink cocktails that bend the odds, and chase a number so large it stops making sense. When your bankroll hits zero, how much of yourself are you willing to sell? Keep spinning. Keep selling. Don't die.

items.title: Kotoha’s Sealed Sword: Hiragana Deckbuilding Demo
items.short_description: Learn and master Japanese with Kotoha! Join her as she goes on a mission to find her grandfather's sealed sword. Discover new creatures. Unlock and craft new words, add them to your hand to aid you in battle.

items.title: Elecade Demo
items.short_description: 用连锁电击击倒失控的机械。 《Elecade》是一款 1bit 增量动作游戏，你将在不断强化中挑战宇宙设施的最上层。

items.title: Imagine We Were Human Demo
items.short_description: A compilation of 12 small literary games about humans meeting and missing one another. Explore these experimental experiences that were made on a monthly basis over the course of a year.

items.title: Ferrano: Beyond Redline Demo
items.short_description: Feel the rush at the limit. Weave through tight traffic in legendary retro supercars within a decaying synthwave simulation. Enter the flow state, synchronize with mates, or drive solo to break the limits and reach beyond the redline.

items.title: Golf 5 MAX Demo
items.short_description: Rise to golf stardom in a fast-paced arcade golf experience inspired by the ‘90s. Master RPG-style progression, compete online, and survive the intense “birdie-or-bust” Arcade Mode.

items.title: The Big Owl Night Demo
items.short_description: Survive a chaotic night in São Paulo of zombies, bosses and cursed upgrades in a fast-paced top-down roguelite. Collect weapons, trigger strange synergies, visit odd merchants and fight until the Big Owl lets you see another sunrise.

items.title: Forklift Basketball Demo
items.short_description: Earn your forklift certification in Forklift Basketball! Forklift Basketball is a chaotic, physics-based sports game where forklifts take center court. Drive, lift, and launch your way to victory in fast-paced matches filled with pure unpredictable fun!

items.title: Father Forgets Demo
items.short_description: 一个简短而富有氛围感的像素艺术故事，讲述一位父亲在深夜意识到自己的错误，并想起什么才是真正重要的。 灵感来自一部经典作品。适合父母、儿子、女儿，以及所有懂得“如果当时……”这种感觉的人。

items.title: BirdPakour Demo
items.short_description: Be free as a bird and dodge the obstacles that come your way.

items.title: Debt Free Dopamine
items.short_description: Buy. Scratch. Win money. Buy more. Don't win. Buy even more cards out of spite.

items.title: Farm Factory Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Grow crops, automate production, and manage your own store. Turn fresh harvests into valuable products, optimize your workflow, and build the ultimate farm-to-market business.

items.title: Bees Harvest Demo
items.short_description: An incremental roguelite collection game where you use gathered nectar and pollen to level up your bees. Start by collecting resources by hand, then automate your swarm. Gather as much nectar and pollen as you can within the limited time.

items.title: ノスフェラトゥの乙女たち
items.short_description: “—I am a genius. That is how I have defined myself.” Nosferatu no Otome-tachi is a visual novel set on a rooftop at night. A brilliant girl and a drowsy girl—two complete opposites—find themselves connected by the Nosferatu disease, and through it, they begin to build a genuine friendship.

items.title: Press a Button Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Welcome to Press a Button Simulator: a new and exciting twist on modern video games. Gone is the time of tryhards and sweats, and in is the new age of only pressing a button! Will you find all the secrets? Of course not! There is only one: You get to press a button!

items.title: 4PGP
items.short_description: 驰骋于世界各地的赛道！本游戏的魅力在于简单易上手的操作性，以及深受各个世代喜爱的设计。在这款街机竞速游戏中，挑战极速，争夺第一吧！

items.title: 33不朽灵魂
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 240 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 33不朽灵魂 是一款支持33位玩家一齐上阵的动作Roguelike合作游戏。立即开启冒险，既可单人作战，也可与好友组队。迎战狱魔大军，击败强大头目，在冒险中不断成长强大。使用游戏内表情与其他反抗者协力作战，共同直面神的怒火。

items.title: 石碑 Demo
items.short_description: 石碑是一款3d等距视角开放探索解谜游戏。你降临在未知的岛屿上，探索遗迹，感受世界，追寻秘密，解救被困在远古谜题中的精灵，方能开启石碑离开此地。

items.title: Bean Wizard Eviscerates the Gonklins Demo
items.short_description: 🫘 The world's first twin-stick anthill shooter! 🫘 Reign terror down on the Gonklins using every bean in your arsenal. Be careful, warrior Gonklins will strike back with their blasters! Upgrade your legume weaponry and defeat King Donklin the Gonklin!

items.title: 深度求财：挖打撤 Demo
items.short_description: 《深度求财》是一款多人对抗的挖掘寻宝游戏，在神秘的地下探索多样的地下环境，跟其他玩家对抗，快速找到外星宝石并撤离，避开可能出现的鬼屋，木乃伊等非自然力量。挖掘，打击，启动列车并迅速撤离！

items.title: 孟婆靓汤 Demo
items.short_description: 一款带有模拟经营元素的纯狱系调饮类视觉小说。玩家扮演新孟婆“小孟娘”，在熟悉又陌生的现代地府中经营汤屋，招待来自三界形形色色的客户。通过熬制各种特调汤品，解决各式千奇八怪脑洞大开的遗忘需求，并逐渐了解到自己失忆和老孟婆失踪的真相……欢迎来到孟婆靓汤！这里的宗旨是——“忘陈莫急”！

items.title: Zombie Hamsters Demo
items.short_description: 一款支持4人合作的在线游戏。扮演僵尸仓鼠，从科学实验室逃脱，并感染你周围的所有人。

items.title: Liminal Logistics
items.short_description: A first-person action simulator where you pick up a box, check the order, stock the right items, and complete as many orders as you can. To level up and unlock new ways of delivering, you must survive a wide variety of handcrafted levels with different objectives.

items.title: Lightyears of Fervent Warfare Demo
items.short_description: Modern old school action with explosive firepower. Rack up kills to upgrade your ship. Use your tech skills wisely. Collect the best loot. And dominate the skies with space shotguns, homing swarm missiles and chain lightning! This is a work-in-progress passion project! ETA November '26!

items.title: Interdimensional Vending Machine
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: Inspired by SCP-261, you play as a homeless girl struggling to survive in a distorted city using a vending machine that should not exist. Every coin dispenses impossible food that defies biology and logic, and every meal reshapes your fate. How long can you survive before you stop being human?

items.title: HOMEWAVE Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到《Homewave OS》，这是一款围绕情绪驱动型操作系统打造的游戏，旨在让你的数字世界更加温暖、更富有人情味。在这里，你可以装饰虚拟房间，接取自由职业工作，探索客户的个人故事，还有更多精彩内容等你发现。

items.title: 财富郡：贸易与生产 Demo
items.short_description: 在中世纪的背景下从零开始发展您的郡，这规模远超单个城市。在广阔多变的地形中确定合适的定居点选址，沿着河流与道路编织贸易网络，并在您的区域逐渐成形时，管理市长、贵族和不同的文化分布。这是一款规模大得多的城市建造游戏，而你治下的每一个定居点的发展和表现，都由你完全定义。

items.title: Castle of Thorns Demo
items.short_description: A mystery visual novel set in a cursed castle. Explore, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth behind the castle's dark past.

items.title: Slay the GoblinZ Demo
items.short_description: It is a demo version of Slay the GoblinZ Slay the GoblinZ - is a dark fantasy incremental RPG where you take on a job to exterminate goblins. Craft unique weapons, master deadly skills, and put an end to the Goblin Forefather.

items.title: Mini Golf Madness
items.short_description: Mini Golf Madness is a chaotic multiplayer mini-golf game where players select, build, and play courses all at once! Navigate tricky obstacles, set clever traps, and compete with friends for the top spot on the scoreboard. Ready to tee off into the madness?

items.title: GemCraft - Legacy Collection Demo
items.short_description: Try out the first few levels of the first three games of the best tower defense franchise of all time!

items.title: Boxcat Climber
items.short_description: Climb, fall, and try again in this Foddian adventure driven by environmental storytelling.

items.title: Beatdown City Survivors
items.short_description: Beatdown City Survivors 是一款怪物攻击幸存者风格的沉浸式沙盒游戏！升级鸽子、靴子和烟花等古怪武器。将它们结合起来，创造出有趣的游戏破坏策略。踢、烧、招募幸存者、制作组合武器、冻结、粉碎、电击——并生存下来！

items.title: Blast Head
items.short_description: 《Blast Head》是一款动态的Roguelite/Bullet Heaven动作游戏，拥有荒诞的武器、强大的符文和非线性的武器技能树。投入10–30分钟的游戏会话，发现疯狂的协同效果，在陌生的竞技场上肆意制造混乱。

items.title: Flesh Blossom Demo
items.short_description: Experience the horror of this Victorian-inspired medical RPG. As Doctor Parsnip Green, you’ll point-and-click your way through difficult choices as you investigate the disease’s origin, operate on patients, and fight to save those you love - all while managing your own dwindling sanity.

items.title: 巫塔战记
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 207 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: 投身开放世界，开启一场终极的巫师冒险。对战生物、收服魔宠，运用法术建造栖身之所，既可在单人模式中独乐乐，又能在多人模式中和其他巫师携手合作。

items.title: Project P.I.T.T. Demo
items.short_description: Feed rubber ducks to a corporate void. Build physics contraptions. Chain combos for profit as the Maw grows hungrier... and larger. Brutalist PSX satire meets first-person sandbox chaos.

items.title: 地精捣蛋团
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 443 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款在线合作游戏，你将化身为一只小地精，闯入民宅制造混乱。躲避各种危险，改造偷来的家居物品，通过完成任务满足地精王的要求。制作装备并升级家园——让任务越做越顺手，捣蛋越来越成功。

items.title: A Puzzle game where you fold Dice Demo
items.short_description: Fold a net of a dice into a cube. This is the only video game in existence that relies on your 3D Spatial Reasoning skill.

items.title: Anomaly Road | 異変車道 [Demo]
items.short_description: "Anomaly Road" is an escape game set on a mountain road in Japan, combining horror, driving, and strange occurrences. While driving, you suddenly realize you've gotten lost on a road deep in the mountains. As you turn a corner with a bad feeling, what awaits you...?

items.title: Hexborn Demo
items.short_description: Hexborn is a dark fantasy action RPG where you rise from an unknown mage into the leader of a legendary guild. Master arcane combat, recruit powerful allies, forge relics, and descend into dangerous dungeons and large-scale raids to uncover the secrets behind your rare ability to fly.

items.title: All That Time
items.short_description: All That Time is a psychological horror experience where you explore unstable dreamlike memories, solve environmental puzzles, and uncover fragmented lives inside a collapsing liminal system.

items.title: Random Horse Derby
items.short_description: 一款极简且全自动的小型赛马游戏。在5匹马中做出选择，赢得尽可能多的胜利，从而提升你的全球 online 排行榜 Dh 。

items.title: Robot Hospice
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Robot Hospice》是一款 2D 像素风格的冒险游戏，在这里，与人类共度时光的机器人将迎来他们的最后旅程。你将作为新员工，照顾这些曾经被深深爱着的机器人，陪伴他们走向生命的终点，体验温柔却又令人心碎的故事。

items.title: 泰坦防线2
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 62% 为好评。
items.short_description: 泰坦巨兽正在践踏你的防线，即刻执行机甲入侵抵御协议！《泰坦防线2》融合RTS塔防与FPS战斗，构建防御体系、调度火力网络、统筹资源科技。指令精准、决策高效，防线将逐渐推进，反向瓦解敌军的装甲洪流。战争已成为精密而残酷的运算。维持逻辑、秩序与绝对理智，进入终局战场，碾碎他们!

items.title: Idle Hacker Demo
items.short_description: IdleHacker is an idler/incremental game where you hack the world.

items.title: Chreynard Demo
items.short_description: 回溯时间，操控分身，在这款创新的2D动作解谜游戏中破解重重谜题。凭借智慧与技巧，在30个充满怀旧魅力的像素风关卡中尽情驰骋。

items.title: Bug Buster Bros
items.short_description: 欢迎来到 Exterminator Inc.！厨房已被侵占，你的班次刚 column 开始，唯有满屋的蟑螂阻挡你拿到薪水。在这款温馨又混乱 columns 的时限生存点击游戏中，狂点并粉碎 4 个恶心房间里的一切吧！

items.title: 流転のジェミニ Demo
items.short_description: A short demo of the RPG Gemini in Flux, a small interlude within the main story. The protagonist roams the land of the dead with their partner — an apothecary — seeking clues to their lost memories and a gift to thank the one they love. Chat with townsfolk to find "Mitama Stones."

items.title: Bus Terminal Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 体验沉浸式终点站管理模拟器。管理乘客，安排时刻表，检查行李，抓捕走私者并防止非法活动。并非所有乘客都是无辜的；有些人会试图欺骗你或携带非法物品。保持警惕，高效管理你的终点站。

items.title: Withdrawal
items.short_description: An FPS roguelike heist. Play as Mr. (?) Norton on his way to exterminate the whole headquarters of the Cranterry Wealth Corporation.

items.title: Immortal Payroll
items.short_description: 修仙世界就像传说中那么美好吗？也许那只是另一个牛马世界。

items.title: Compound Interest Demo
items.short_description: The networks are dead. The city has fallen. Manage your crew and send them into danger to earn money and respect. Claim turf, control trade, and make allies or enemies as you reshape the fully simulated city of New Sterling.

items.title: 2 Players 1 Character Demo
items.short_description: 一款合作游戏。两个灵魂共同操控一个萌系角色，齐心协力逃离冥界、登上天堂。

items.title: 邪恶推币机
items.short_description: 《邪恶推币机》是一款融合了肉鸽策略与推币机爽感的黑暗风游戏。你负债累累，被困在一家永不打烊的黑暗酒吧里。你唯一的生路，就是面前的推币机——推下硬币、堆起闪亮的币塔、摇动机台，感受硬币倾泻而下的致命快感，解开隐藏在推币机背后的谜团。

items.title: Flower Outline
items.short_description: Flowers minimalist relaxing jigsaw.

items.title: Realm of the Wyvern Demo
items.short_description: A tactical turn-based RPG set in a fully handcrafted dark fantasy world.

items.title: Car Wash Simulator (Demo)
items.short_description: 泡沫！冲洗！闪耀！投入洗车行业，以高压水枪的视角来体验这款官方试玩版吧！用丰富的活性泡沫冲洗掉道路污垢，在3辆独特的汽车上掌握从车窗到轮胎的核心清洁机制，并在停车场进行试驾！

items.title: 战争警戒 Demo
items.short_description: 战线在废墟与烟尘间缓慢推进，你将指挥步兵、装甲与空中力量在混乱前线拉开阵势。占点、突破、包围与反包围层层展开。无数值付费，公平对战，唯有清晰的策略与默契的协作能帮助你赢得胜利。

items.title: 放置大陆 试玩版
items.short_description: Idle RPG Strategy game where you gather resources, battle creatures, and upgrade your gear. Master 10+ skills to create items you can equip or sell. Your journey never stops, even offline. No Microtransactions, No P2W, just pure idle fun.

items.title: Wall World Strategy Demo
items.short_description: 在无尽之墙的表面建立并领导你的殖民地。管理资源与居民，研发全新科技，抵御无休止的泽雷克进攻，并派遣机械蜘蛛执行高风险探索任务。维持殖民地的运转——在墙世界中，一切都很容易分崩离析。

items.title: Into The Depths
items.short_description: 这是一款 Roguelike 城市建造游戏，带你深入神秘的地下世界。建设你的定居点，探索洞穴，并一步步向地底最深处扩张。在黑暗中克服潜伏的危险，将深渊中的财富据为己有！

items.title: Lofi Cozy Room Demo
items.short_description: 桌面一角的透明迷你房间和悠扬 Lo-Fi 音乐,让你的工作时光更加舒心。在试玩版中抢先体验《Lofi Cozy Room》的全部功能。

items.title: All one click Demo
items.short_description: "All one click" is an Action-RPG that reduces player input to the most exciting part of every RPG: the level-up. Prove yourself against thousands of enemies in seemingly endless waves. Use the power of magic spells to assert yourself against the countless enemies. But be warned: every click counts!

items.title: Cardora Demo
items.short_description: A multiplayer card game that fuses Poker and Okey mechanics with powerful active and passive cards. Build clever combinations, disrupt your opponents with interaction cards, and outplay everyone at the table.

items.title: 碎镜 Shardmirror
items.short_description: 《碎镜》是一款中式妖异题材的肉鸽卡牌构筑游戏。每张卡牌拥有正反两面。拥有双轨地图，全局镜魇系统。。。以及一些奇怪的,打破第四面墙的机制。

items.title: Quick Brown
items.short_description: Explore a surreal forest full of meerkats, collect alphabet relics, and help a fox chase a dream no animal has ever reached.

items.title: Fruit Fetish Demo
items.short_description: Fruit Fetish is an active incremental game where you must strive to make as much money as fast as possible by harvesting and selling a range of juicy fruits. Upgrade your skills and shop to become a master at your craft. Maybe if you work hard enough, you can finally please your corporate overlords.

items.title: Lab 2040
items.short_description: Lab 2040 is a Sci-fi, first person shooter game where the player combats different robots and drones using various weapons. Weapons include pistols, automatic guns, grenade, time bombs and more. There are 10 main levels which you will have to progress through to get to the final boss, Bamidele.

items.title: Increbouncer Demo
items.short_description: Increbouncer 是一款短小的放置类弹球游戏，您可以发射球、从墙壁弹跳和球球碰撞中赚取两种货币、解锁新球，并升级技能树以最大化收入。

items.title: PC Companion
items.short_description: A unique desktop companion that lives on your PC, reacts to your activity, and evolves with you. Each player gets only one heroine… unless they uncover the secret.

items.title: FreeStyle Football 2 Demo
items.short_description: 《自由足球2》是一款快节奏的5v5在线多人足球竞技游戏。 每个位置都有独特的角色分工，你需要运用各种策略和技能，与队友一起赢得胜利。 炫酷的玩法和独特的角色将球场变幻为展现自我的舞台。

items.title: Lastgirl Survivor
items.short_description: Survive the bizarre mechanical courthouse! 'Lastgirl Survivor' is a pixel art, single PvE action rogue-lite featured game! Forget boring auto-battlers—smash through endless grotesque monsters using precise rhythm-based dashes. Find out the TRUTH with I:sol..!

items.title: SWAT God Demo
items.short_description: SWAT God 是世界上最快的射击游戏。独特的鼠标操控带来无限的速度与精准度。冷酷无情的敌人只会越来越强。你够快吗？

items.title: Hack 42: Typing Incremental Demo
items.short_description: Hack 42 is a short typing incremental game about crafting powerful hacks and smashing computers for fun and profit.

items.title: Come in
items.short_description: 经过几个月的线上聊天，她邀请你到她家来。 一栋位于偏僻森林深处的静谧小屋，似乎是浪漫邂逅的完美场所。但你待得越久，就越觉得这地方不对劲。

items.title: ChopstickSimulator
items.short_description: simulation game where you pick up beans using chopsticks! With a variety of beans available, collectors will find it incredibly addictive. The calming background music and sound effects make it perfect for unwinding after a long day of other games. Enjoy this chill game now!

items.title: 修仙纪-守护宗门 Demo
items.short_description: 在苍茫修仙世界，你身为宗门核心弟子，肩负守护宗门阵眼的重任。一旦阵眼被破，万年基业将毁于一旦。精心布下防御仙塔，构筑铁壁防线；防线稳固时，深入秘境斩妖除魔，搜集灵材与仙宝。将资源用于塔防升级与仙法觉醒，在一波波凶猛妖魔攻势中，守护宗门最后的希望。你是固守阵眼，还是仗剑主动出击？

items.title: House Warming Demo
items.short_description: Brian Lewis 买下一栋老房子，希望开始安静而有秩序的生活。但在第一个夜晚，房子就开始变得诡异……原本看似无害的意外，逐渐变成更加可怕的事情……如果屋里还有别人呢？

items.title: 方块计算机 Demo
items.short_description: 在这款极简主义的逻辑解谜游戏中，你将化身为计算法则的构筑者。通过排列功能各异的逻辑方块，构建起精巧的数据处理通路。

items.title: Final Shelter
items.short_description: A multiplayer social survival game inspired by the “Bunker” board game, where players must convince others that they deserve a place in the shelter. Debate, argue, reveal your character traits, and vote - only a few will survive.

items.title: ABOVE
items.short_description: A daylight, psychological horror experience. Stranded in the desert, every choice meant to save you brings something closer.

items.title: Into the Cannon, Soldier! Demo
items.short_description: 你已身处最后一道防线。招募将士，死守阵地，用一尊巨炮将他们发射到另一片正在崩溃的血肉磨坊中。在这款支持1-2人合作的战术防御游戏中，你就是悬在两场战役头顶的审判之剑——你的每一个残酷决定，都将改写双线战场的最终命运。

items.title: 专业抬杠
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 暴躁国王空降峡谷，你和TA的“担架”闯关正式开始！当暴躁国王被炮弹炸到你们脚边时，一场爆笑协作冒险就此展开。两人需默契操控担架，将国王平安护送回王座。这条道路危机四伏、布满奇怪陷阱！每次惊险平衡都是心跳考验，每次翻车都成为甜蜜回忆，快喊上和你关系最好的TA，准备好笑出腹肌吧！

items.title: Cats and Tails
items.short_description: Cats & Tails is a luck-driven coin game where you chase a streak of 10 Cats, face unpredictable outcomes, and unlock multiple endings over repeated playthroughs.

items.title: 明鉴侦探事务所 Demo
items.short_description: 《明鉴侦探事务所》是一款以90年代韩国为背景、以剧情为核心的双人合作推理游戏。 哥哥与幽灵妹妹接受人类与幽灵的委托，一同调查案件。 玩家将从各自不同的视角收集线索，并通过沟通来完成谜题。 在不对称的信息中协作，并展开推理。 来体验那个使用BP机与公用电话的模拟时代，揭开潜藏于城市之中的谜团吧。

items.title: 包罗万象 Demo
items.short_description: 《包罗万象Demo》是一款以挖掘道具为核心、融合轻度 Rogue 元素的回合制休闲牌组构筑游戏。 背上能够自动回收道具的魔法背包，升级你的装备，探索强力的组合，击败强敌，守护王国的和平。 ……等等？连垃圾也会被自动收回？ 那看来，只能从垃圾堆里把能用的东西再挖出来继续战斗了。

items.title: Detective INNA DUKE
items.short_description: Detective Inna Duke is a noir story-driven visual novel where you team up with lieutenant Inna Duke and her partner corporal Fernal to investigate the mysterious abduction of the popular streamer Oleh Hamston. But will you manage to track down the poor hamster in rainy city?

items.title: Labytrip Spirit Demo
items.short_description: LabyTrip Spirit is an adventure puzzle-action game about a soul lost in the labyrinths of the afterlife. Work with friends to guide the spirit to ascension, or vie with other players toward the abyss. Be watchful, shrewd, and swift as you make your way through the changing labyrinths of limbo.

items.title: 摸鱼作家Demo
items.short_description: 挂机写书。敲键盘、点击鼠标、看视频都会成为你书中的一个个字。卖书，挣钱后装扮自己梦想的书店。可以和朋友们一起玩。

items.title: Void Ignition Demo
items.short_description: Void Ignition Demo is an atmospheric sci-fi incremental game.

items.title: Personality Imprint Demo
items.short_description: 在名为“选民”统治下的末世，人格印记选中的小队向着世界的另一头进军反抗。

items.title: 点击地牢 Demo
items.short_description: 像素风异世界肉鸽地牢冒险！5种职业自由搭配技能与道具，在随机生成的致命地牢中展开回合制战斗。对抗哥布林、兽人与亡灵，收集神器，挑战隐藏Boss。死亡即新生，无数Build等你征服。成为拯救王国的英雄！

items.title: Election: Run for President
items.short_description: Run for President is a fun, fast-paced election simulator that blends strategy, civics, and gameplay into an experience kids and adults can enjoy together. Play head-to-head like a board game using a single iPad/iPhone, or use it as an engaging classroom learning tool.

items.title: MECCHA CHAMELEON
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 956 篇用户评测中有 74% 为好评。
items.short_description: 把自己涂满颜色，融入背景吧！《Meccha Chameleon》是一款全新感觉的捉迷藏游戏，玩家需要在自己纯白的身体上绘图以拟态成关卡中的样子。躲藏地点、姿势，以及最重要的“画功”是生存的关键。用连变色龙都自愧不如的技术欺骗追捕者的眼睛，在时限内逃出生天吧！您还可以轻松享受随机匹配或观众参与型直播。

items.title: Chromium 小恐龙
items.short_description: 经典 Chromium 恐龙跑酷全面升级！穿越沙漠、雪原、森林、城市、太空五大生态，收集道具与皮肤，挑战幽灵竞速和每日关卡，支持本地双人同屏游玩。上手简单，精通困难。

items.title: 时光枝的秋叶 Demo
items.short_description: 如果你所爱的一切，注定会被时代的洪流吞没，你是否愿意为之而战？ 国产独立ADV游戏《时光枝的秋叶》试玩版，包含故事序章，展现世界观、角色关系和第一重核心悬念。以视觉小说的方式展现人与人工智能，渺小的个体与社会的浪潮之间最真实的碰撞。

items.title: “Fu Sha 3: Night Clinic Demo
items.short_description: 用文字冒险的方式，在深夜医院中度过生死未卜的可怕夜晚，《伏煞3 夜诊》有着大量支线选项及二十多个结局，任何选择都可能会触发令人难以直面的恐怖，最终你是否能够做出正确的选择，躲避致命的危险，逃出这场死亡的诅咒？

items.title: Undelve Demo
items.short_description: A 2D Sci-fi Action Looter Shooter. Collect items and decide which to scrap for ammo while exploring a vast cave system, blowing up the very tunnels spiders use to reach you.

items.title: Re:Bloom 花精霊のぽかぽか温泉郷
items.short_description: A mysterious hot spring where fragile flower spirits gather. As the caretaker, you build baths and watch over them. By soaking, they regain vitality little by little. Collect Poka Energy to expand your springs and enjoy a relaxing idle clicker simulation.

items.title: Blosharper：百花之战 Demo
items.short_description: 《Blosharper》是一款扭曲了花图（Hwatu）规则的老千模拟类Rogue卡牌构筑游戏。不要只凭运气——在残酷的地下赌场里，通过组合隐秘的“出老千”技能来操纵牌局，偿还巨额债务，击败冷酷无情的Boss，成为传说中的老千并活下去！

items.title: Aislebound
items.short_description: Aislebound is a first-person retail management simulator. Start with a small empty store and build it into a thriving retail operation by ordering inventory, stocking shelves, managing deliveries, hiring staff, and keeping customers satisfied.

items.title: Unfriend Demo
items.short_description: In a lighthearted, cartoony couch game, create custom trivia scenarios where your own media—photos, drawings, and words—are the stars of the show. Answer with your funniest quotes to earn votes, win the game, and hopefully keep your friendships intact along the way.

items.title: VOID ARMOR: FORM DRIVE Demo
items.short_description: 《VOID ARMOR: FORM DRIVE》是一款俯视角机甲动作射击游戏。玩家可以即时切换能量剑、步枪、发射器和防御系统，击破敌方机甲。贴近敌人进行斩击，远距离开火，或使用防御系统抵挡来袭攻击。完成任务，挑战更高评价。

items.title: STILL WATCHING: The Night Caregiver Demo
items.short_description: 互动式恐怖游戏的独家前传。将你的真实智能手机和 Twitch 聊天室链接到游戏。躲藏起来，不要对着麦克风发出声音，努力生存。聊天室会实时操控你的恐惧，而拨打到你真实手机的电话将会在黑暗中向怪物暴露你的位置。

items.title: Knock From Inside Demo
items.short_description: On Halloween night, something begins knocking from inside your apartment, turning an ordinary night into a terrifying encounter with something that should not be there.

items.title: Idlemoor
items.review_summary: 差评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 0% 为好评。
items.short_description: Idlemoor is a dark fantasy idle MMORPG set in a persistent online realm. Trade on the marketplace, fight in battlegrounds, defend the town in community events, and chat with fellow Wanderers! Infinite build possibilities, where each item is completely unique. Will your build be the best?

items.title: Restoration: Chronicles of Survival
items.short_description: Rebuild a fallen kingdom in a cozy idle-RPG. An economy that earns while you sleep, a hero who raids for loot and gear, and endless prestige. No energy limits. No ads. No pay-to-win.

items.title: Portucale Sword and Subtlety
items.short_description: Portucale is a strategic card-battler set in a brutal new kingdom. Build prestige, fortify borders, and weaponize treachery with the unique Cheat mechanic. In this tense psychological duel, your walls generate gold while you dismantle your rival’s legacy through sword and subtlety.

items.title: SHROT Demo
items.short_description: Make your way through destroyed Las Vegas and fight aliens, robots, and degenerates (zombies) in this goofy, funny, male-oriented humoristic FPS inspired by boomer shooters!

items.title: RETURN Machine.Love()
items.short_description: 3 different Robot-romance stories. Written, drawn, and made by humans, for humans. Since the very moment the first mechanical mind became aware of itself, it craved love. No one truly understand why the heart made of copper and wires started beating, but it did. Even after we were gone.

items.title: Crownseeker
items.short_description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

items.title: We Belong Dead
items.short_description: Toxic Yuri VN between a mad scientist, and her spectral lover who haunts the living. It has been far too long since you passed. You have been gone for so long. But no longer. I will bring you back my love. No matter the cost.

items.title: Pun Chan Pop Demo
items.short_description: Think fast, match faster! Chain 5 pieces in any direction to win, or use the Square-Merge to turn 2x2 clusters into massive, high-scoring blocks before clearing them. Battle cute animals to a pulsing Bitpop soundtrack in this frantic puzzle showdown!

items.title: No Humanity - Internship Demo
items.short_description: 《惨无人道 2 丢你飞刀》是一款rogue-lite太空历险RPG，用绳子甩武器的物理打怪兽游戏。作为一个橘子企业的实习生，你的职责除了打扫厕所，买咖啡，偶然还得去拯救全宇宙。用你的那根太空伸缩肚脐带，配上你的黑洞宝石，再组装上你的激光猫，配合无与伦比的反应，兴高采烈地带领全人类探索无尽奇葩的宇宙吧！

items.title: Bust a Nut! A Game About Raising Cocks Demo
developers: Society for the Advancement of Agriculture
publishers: Society for the Advancement of Agriculture
items.short_description: An Incremental game where you bust nuts with your own two hands or an army of cocks, beavers and asses ;)

items.title: The three little pigs at the slaughterhouse Demo
items.short_description: Deep inside a slaughterhouse, play as three little pigs trying to escape in this first‑person horror adventure. Between twisted experiments and industrial death, will you survive this hell where madness and hatred reshape flesh

items.title: Nano CODE:X Demo
items.short_description: A small 2D game where you sneak through a lab simulation, collect parts, and rebuild your drone companion with multiple possible looks.

items.title: Graveyard Cabin Demo
items.short_description: 一款FMV异常恐怖游戏。你是一座荒凉墓地的夜间警卫。监控摄像头，找出异常现象，并努力活下去。

items.title: Hannibal Demo
items.short_description: Hannibal is a grand strategy game with real-time tactical battles. Choose regions on the campaign map, command your army, and take direct control when war begins. Build formations, break enemy lines, and lead your empire to victory through smart strategy and battlefield decisions.

items.title: Brassfang Demo
items.short_description: Explore a castle filled with monsters and sinister experiments in this steampunk action RPG metroidvania. Combine vampiric and mechanical powers, face challenging bosses, and create unique builds through randomized upgrade choices.

items.title: Fever Trip Demo
items.short_description: Fever Trip is a surreal roguelike FPS where the arena reacts to your system audio. Wield living weapons, fight grotesque creatures, collect upgrades, and survive a chaotic fever dream powered by your own music.

items.title: Lamp Clicker Demo
items.short_description: Lamp Clicker》的小幅预览--这是一款关于......嗯，点击一盏灯的简单闲置/点击游戏。

items.title: PixelPop 2087 Demo
items.short_description: Enter the rooms, grab the keys, proceed and... try to stay alive! Choose your style: melee or fireguns? Fight your way through, get the keys and unlock new rooms!

items.title: Motelia Demo
items.short_description: A psychological horror game set in an old roadside motel. Clean the rooms, fix broken items, and deal with strange guests. Focus on your daily tasks while trying to keep your sanity.

items.title: Tiny Farm Big Money Together Demo
items.short_description: 一款基于物理的资源管理与生产游戏，支持最多2人合作游玩。

items.title: Chasing Whiskers
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Catch cats in this cozy adventure game! After falling into Catworld through an interdimensional portal, you must find your missing cat by completing errands for Ponpon, the local Cat Café owner. Chase, catch and collect until you can find your way home! This game is made by students.

items.title: Charades Universe Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到 Charades Universe，这是一款有趣的派对游戏，玩家可以表演、唱歌、绘画或默写屏幕上显示的提示，而朋友或队友则可以尝试猜出这些提示。灵感源自经典的猜字谜游戏。

items.title: Silent Howl
items.short_description: In Silent Howl, every night is a fight for survival. Villagers must unmask the Werewolves lurking among them, ready to strike from the shadows. But beware, powerful hidden roles can shift the balance. Will you expose the truth and save the village, or tear it apart from within?

items.title: NBA THE RUN
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 347 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
items.short_description: Take your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, in this fast-paced, online 3v3 basketball game. Stack wins, earn cred and become the GOAT of THE RUN. Who's Got Next?

items.title: Crimson Solstice Demo
items.short_description: A cozy horror adventure. Uncover the mysteries of the Crimson Solstice and decide Moonvale’s fate. Build relationships and manage resources as time is of the essence. Spend your days wisely and help the townsfolk of Moonvale survive.

items.title: Draw Party
items.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer drawing game where talent is optional, confidence is required, and everyone lies about what they were drawing.

items.title: 蛋岛的鸟 Demo
items.short_description: 在蛋岛经营一片小小栖息地：种植鸟粮、照料鸟儿、孵化鸟蛋，并通过繁殖与基因组合收集不同品种的小鸟。本 Demo 展示游戏的基础种植、养成、孵化与收集循环。

items.title: From Ashes To Glory Demo
items.short_description: A turn-based medieval arena RPG where every dodge matters. Forge your legend as Korkut, a young gladiator searching for the truth behind his father's disappearance. Master the blade, time your strikes, and rise through the tournaments — or fall in the sand.

items.title: Paranormal Footages : Supervisor Demo
items.short_description: Paranormal Footages: Supervisor Demo — a prequel to the events of the main game. Archie is supposed to finish his last shift at the warehouse before his transfer, but inexplicable events begin to unfold.

items.title: Lucky's Funhouse
items.short_description: You must stay alive in this horror/puzzle adventure. Do your best to survive the monsters of the funhouse and uncover the mystery behind them. Multiple endings. Will you partake in the madness, or find a way out. She is coming.

items.title: Bering Tonnage Demo
items.short_description: 在这款海运大亨游戏中，建造并自动化你的货运船队，连接超过250个真实港口。指挥船只穿越战略运河，应对热带气旋与地缘政治制裁，将一家小型航运公司发展为全球物流帝国。

items.title: Soulbound: Online Demo
items.short_description: You wake with no memory inside a world under the influence of the Anima. In Soulbound, slay hordes of enemies in roguelite dungeon runs, craft legendary weapons and build your base. Squad up for 3-player co-op, compete in clan raids for rare loot, and survive in a massive open world.

items.title: Behind Room 102 Demo
items.short_description: In a dark nation of crime and corruption, you're more than just a hotel worker. Inspect the people in front of you, catch their lies, and make decisions. Your boss expects the best. To survive in this ruthless world, doing what you're told is a MUST! But will you follow every order?

items.title: NUMBAKO-なんばこ-
items.short_description: Blackjack in a falling-block puzzle game!? Clear all your stocked lines at once, and flood your rival’s board with garbage blocks!

items.title: BUNNYBastion
items.short_description: 快节奏Roguelite防御游戏：击退一波又一波敌人，选择强力升级，在约10分钟的一局战斗中不断变强。

items.title: Axom: Conquest
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 23 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款坚守型塔防类Roguelite游戏中，建造并守卫你的堡垒，同时通过精炼厂扩展经济。征战程序生成的外星母星，对抗不断蔓延、会摧毁建筑的腐化地形，解锁数百种建筑、升级与强化。在物理驱动的虫群围攻下，守护人类最后的希望。

items.title: How to Make an Atomic Bomb in Your Garden
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 93 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一个荒谬的后院原子弹建造模拟器。筹集资金，规划你的方法，寻找稀有部件，并在保持冷静的同时组装你的原子杰作，避免引起邻居和联邦特工的怀疑。

items.title: Dynastic Era
items.short_description: Simple map coloring game, And about history of ancient civilized, Mini ancient strategy game with a large world map to explore, in which you can simulate different ancient civilizations, the game will have different chapters showing ancient historical events.

items.title: Character Limit Demo
items.short_description: 12 Letters, No Mercy. The demo of the fast-paced typing word game. How long can you last before you hit your Character Limit?

items.title: Giga Lich Demo
items.short_description: This is a single-player PvE extraction dungeon crawler where combat is king, and resources are limited. Explore the dungeon to utilize powerful equipment and souls-like combat to overcome the dungeon's guardians.

items.title: Crude Oil
items.short_description: 扮演一滩不羁的石油，从油业大亨的魔掌中开溜！要想丰满多汁，就来吸收原油！滑铲、弹跳，开机械巨兽！施展浑身解数，将污染缺德佬统统轰走！

items.title: Cauldron Craft
items.short_description: Grab your backpack and get ready to explore the seemingly peaceful lands of Cauldron Craft. Explore various areas, gather magical items, and craft, craft, CRAFT.

items.title: WriteNor Demo
items.short_description: WriteNor 是一款心理元恐怖游戏，终端是你唯一的武器。 被困在损坏的办公室中，你通过真实指令重写现实，而失控的 AI——NORI 正在注视你的一举一动。

items.title: Game Design at WVU Arcade
items.short_description: A 3d arcade game in which you play the machines in your store to upgrade them and get ready for opening day. All games are created by students and alumni from Game Design and Interactive Media at West Virginia University.

items.title: Pogo Froggo Demo
items.short_description: Two frogs, one bar, zero coordination. Bounce up the mountain before your tank breaks... and before you blame each other.

items.title: Ward Off Evil Demo
items.short_description: Ward Off Evil is an open world strategy RPG set in an apocalyptic sword & sorcery world. Create your character, rally an army, and roam the wastes as you battle to avert, or bring about, the end of the Cycle.

items.title: Multi Brick Breaker
items.short_description: 与对手实时对决：用你的球拍和球，在对手之前摧毁所有砖块！使用各种道具（多球、火球、冰冻等等）征服每个关卡。上手容易，精通难——你能每场比赛都获得三星吗？

items.title: LIGHT FORCE Demo
items.short_description: You are a speck of light. Charge to gather power, release to dash — momentum is everything. Master four arcade modes — Race, Dodge, Break, and Battle — across 40 hand-crafted levels, endless survival runs, 10 combat arenas, and online versus.

items.title: JUMP & MOW
items.short_description: 一款主打 3D 跳跃、躲避与合作清场的 survivor-like 动作生存游戏。升级技能，构筑 build，强化装备，杀穿怪潮并击倒 Boss。

items.title: Immunity Protocol
items.short_description: Pilot an immune-cell sentinel in a neon pixel-art horde-survival auto-shooter. Move manually, auto-fire evolving weapons, draft upgrades, equip symbiotes, and survive escalating pathogen swarms inside a collapsing biotech system.

items.title: SPRAWL zero Demo
items.short_description: SPRAWL zero is a fast-paced shooter inspired by the Golden Age of 2000s FPS. Survive a brutal cyberpunk city collapsing under military rule and cult fanaticism. Use your Gravity-Gloves, augments, and an arsenal of over 40 weapons to crush those who stand in your way.

items.title: PaceBreak Demo
items.short_description: Pacebreak is a first-person parkour speedrunning game. Try the demo with 5 official maps and full leaderboard support!

items.title: 小小元素精灵 试玩版 (Little Elementals Demo)
items.short_description: 想成为人类的小小元素精灵们的欢乐大逃亡！ 偷偷前往人类世界旅行的火之精灵和水之精灵，最终还是被发现，并被关进了监牢。 为了救出他们而踏上冒险旅程的，是土之精灵——以及……风之精灵！？ 他们究竟能否成功逃脱，并顺利抵达人类世界呢？ 快与小小元素精灵们一起踏上冒险之旅吧！

items.title: 魔饮心语轶闻：梦行者
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 欢迎老板！ 在这款受D&D启发的视觉小说中，你将经营温馨的海滨酒馆，结识各路冒险者，搜罗小道消息，调制能改写命运的魔饮，阻止美梦被扭曲成噩梦。

items.title: WHERE TO? Demo
items.short_description: Drive a late-night taxi through a city where no one can be trusted. Pick up suspicious passengers, follow unsettling routes, and face strange conversations and irreversible choices. Tonight, who you take, where you drop them off, and where you go next are all up to you. A retro horror taxi game.

items.title: 取经人 Demo
items.short_description: 在《取经人》中踏上你的冒险之旅！磨炼战斗技艺，收集各类法宝，结识同行之人，迎战凶悍妖王。穿行于广袤的西游神话世界，寻找那位取经人，揭开这段西行之路背后的隐秘真相！

items.title: Ocean Cleaner Idle
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
items.short_description: “Ocean Cleaner Idle” is a cozy incremental clicker game where you relax while cleaning the ocean! As an Atlantean, your sacred duty is to collect the waste humans left behind and help Mother Nature to improve the ecosystem.

items.title: Wordrix
items.short_description: Crack hidden words using letter clues, play daily challenges, and progress through a campaign of short mission phrases across multiple difficulty levels.

items.title: Cubepathy Demo
items.short_description: A simple, chill platformer in almost empty space. Nail the perfect jump - now help your friend without losing your progress. Made a mistake? Now your friend can help you out. Be a platform for your friends, pull them out of the void, help them jump higher.

items.title: Catnip Craze Demo
items.short_description: A bite-sized incremental idle game about cats, catnip, and numbers going up. Harvest catnip, hire cats, unlock production tiers, and prestige to witness the inevitable conclusion of the craze.

items.title: Ballatory Demo 0.9
items.short_description: The demo version of Ballatory, a short incremental idler where you build and upgrade a chaotic swarm of bouncing balls to destroy cores and earn crazy amounts of money.

items.title: Stackmon Demo
items.short_description: 快来游玩这款独具卡牌堆叠特色的宠物收集游戏，堆叠、训练并收集超过 35 种强大的堆叠妖怪！建造你的营地，与对手侦察兵战斗，对抗在你的故乡各处蔓延的神秘腐化现象。

items.title: Dungeon Dash: Relic Of Binding
items.short_description: The Relic of Binding has chosen you. Navigate puzzles, battle monster hordes, and hunt for treasure through a dungeon that never plays the same way twice. Master the relic's power, beat the clock, and return it to its sanctum before the darkness spreads forever.

items.title: 勇者绝赞延误中 Demo
items.short_description: 讨伐魔王的远征一再延误，但铁路仍在向北延伸。 作为勇者小队的顾问，你和勇者坐在同一节车厢里——它既是你们的交通工具，也是一路向北的家。沿途的人会认出你，车厢里的痕迹一点点变多，路还很长。

items.title: Not A Bot
items.short_description: 在这款短小而混乱的解谜游戏中证明你不是机器人。游戏充满了令人烦躁的 CAPTCHA 风格小游戏、棘手的输入和刻意令人沮丧的挑战。

items.title: 文明幸存者
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款类吸血鬼幸存者的肉鸽游戏，你需要操控一颗恒星去吸收新的行星，然后通过吸收不同的能量来进化成为你想要的文明。

items.title: Incremental Orbits Demo
items.short_description: A short and relaxing incremental game about discovering and exploring the planets of our solar system

items.title: Idle Aqua Driller Demo
items.short_description: 深入海上石油钻井平台的前四层，开采水下资源。管理设施、雇佣潜水员并部署潜艇。解锁更高价值的层级，升级甲板，并提升效率与开采速度。

items.title: 沙雕之路
items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 998 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 某一天，一个叫做丁德成的人看到邻居家晚饭吃凉拌海蜇，很馋，于是决定出门买海蜇。他与路上结识的同伴在沙雕大陆开始了一段充满想象的旅行，最终穿越多个次元，上演了一段波澜壮阔的买海蜇之旅。

items.title: Lusófona Games Collection 2025
items.short_description: Lusófona Games Collection 2025 brings you five unique, student and staff made games from Lusófona University. Dive into creative prototypes packed with passion, gameplay innovation, and behind-the-scenes commentary from the next generation of game developers!

items.title: Crystalyn Demo
items.short_description: Start with one bullet. End with hundreds. Crystalyn is a fast-paced top-down bullet-hell looter shooter about pushing your build to its absolute limits. Fight monsters, defeat bosses, and turn their loot into unstoppable firepower.

items.title: JAM Adventures
items.short_description: JamAdventure is a musical odyssey where your real-life instrument is the controller. Explore 10 vibrant themed realms to discover and master unique songs, or import your own library to jam along to your favorite tracks. Tuned for 6-string guitar and 4-string bass, but supports nearly any instrument.

items.title: Wound Man
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 19 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Wound Man》是一款黑暗风格的拼图冒险游戏，你将通过拼合数世纪前的解剖学插图，重构一具饱受折磨的躯体。随着每一块拼图归位，隐藏的秘密逐渐显现，奇异的收藏品也将收入囊中。

items.title: Spreadsheets & Dungeons Demo
items.short_description: A grid-based turn-based roguelike where you manage a party across a dungeon which is a spreadsheet. Explore each dungeon, level up your heroes, build synergies, scale absurd stats, and survive escalating dungeon pressure through tactical positioning and resource management.

items.title: 沃德灵：共生
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 755 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 扮演一名寄生末世的太空生物学家，与被称为“沃德灵”的生物神经链接，展开第三人称科幻射击动作冒险。在颠覆传统的怪兽捕捉玩法中，培育数量众多的沃德灵品种，并在丰富的进化路线之中借助基因交配，尝试近乎无穷无尽的物种组合，打造属于你的终极生物！

items.title: Hardware Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 从零开始建立你的五金帝国！体验真实的商业运作，包括产品采购、动态定价、在线订单和配送管理。提升你的知名度，扩展你的店铺，成为全国最成功的五金商人！

items.title: The Whisper Shift
items.short_description: Equipped with only a flashlight initially, within this first person horror game, The Whisper Shift has you play as Val Hesflame. A reporter investigating strange murders at a police station, and uncover details related to the mysterious deaths through notes scattered inside of the building.

items.title: Don't Stop The Pop! Demo
items.short_description: 准备好将一颗小小的玉米粒变成一台停不下来的爆米花机了吗？利用庞大的技能树制定你的策略；解锁从咸味到巧克力味、从辣味到海盐焦糖味等数十种丰富口味，让屏幕填满爆炸的艺术！赚得更多，爆得更爽！Don't Stop the Pop! 🍿

items.title: 20 Floors
items.short_description: You are left alone on the top floor of an apartment. Your only goal is to reach the ground. But as you descend, the corridor you once knew begins to warp into something grotesque. There’s no telling what horror awaits. Just don't stop. Keep going down.

items.title: Rally TS Demo
items.short_description: Rally TS Demo - The Ultimate Auto Simulator Experience Embark on an epic journey through the world of rally racing in TS Rally, where your dream of becoming the #1 racer in the Race of Champions begins with a single street car and rise to the global championship glory.

items.title: Unending Aqua Demo
items.short_description: Explore a mysterious tropical island resort. Collect items and solve puzzles to progress. Survive against dangerous enemies. Piece together the story of the hotel and uncover the dark secrets that it holds.

items.title: ARE YOU OKAY?
items.short_description: ARE YOU OKAY? is a short immersive psychological experience of existential horror and narrative. You must answer questions from 3 different forms displayed on an old TV screen.

items.title: Lost Dude Demo
items.short_description: Lost Dude 是一款氛围浓厚的 2D 平台冒险游戏，讲述了一名角色踏上寻找失踪好友的旅程，在途中经历各种事件，并在重逢后一起展开新的冒险。

items.title: Eden's Eclipse
items.short_description: The third installment in the Eden series A 2D bullet-hell vertical-scrolling shump with a feel reminiscent of arcade games from the 1990s to the 2000s.

items.title: 银发冒险家Old But Gold
items.short_description: 爷爷答应孙女，要在她上小学第一天去接她放学。 为此，他努力学会了独自扫码乘车……可当真正独自面对手机屏幕时，一切都变得手忙脚乱起来。 这是一款聚焦老年人数字化生活困境的叙事冒险游戏。移动、跳跃、滑动物体、点击攻击——四种简单操作，串联起一场老人与数字世界的“战斗”。你将扮演一位爷爷，在他的“脑海世界”与现实场景之间穿行——从记忆浮岛上的基础操作教学，到手机应用商城里的跑酷冲刺，最终在人脸识别BOSS战中完成自我突破。这不仅仅是一个游戏，更是一面镜子。那些烦人的弹窗广告、自己点错按钮时的懊恼……都是我们身边真实发生的事。通关之后，你也许会想起家里的某位老人，然后愿意对他们说一句：别急，慢慢来。

items.title: Hat Together (Demo)
items.short_description: 两名玩家，两种截然不同的体型，一个共同的目标。叫上你的朋友，夺下所有的帽子，在我们这款合作平台跳跃游戏的免费试玩版中，尽量别把对方扔进深渊。

items.title: The Awakening Demo
items.short_description: 《The Awakening》是一款动作生存恐怖游戏，讲述了一位姐姐试图将陷入昏迷的妹妹救回的故事。

items.title: Into the End (of the World) Demo
items.short_description: 驾驶、维护并求生。在末日世界中探索程序生成的生物群落，搜刮汽车部件，并与好友一同清除感染区。从底盘开始打造你的末日座驾并维持其运转——因为失去它，你将无法走得更远。

items.title: TACS Classic Collection
items.short_description: Explore ten unique and quirky games from the vaults of PlayStation Mobile, preserved in the TACS Classic Collection.

items.title: Knuckle Creek Demo
items.short_description: Knuckle Creek is a slapstick comedy brawler designed for friends, fun and light-hearted play sessions.

items.title: Footprint of Y
items.short_description: 《Footprint of Y》是一款回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过在战斗中规划行动、逐步推进流程并提升角色能力，在连贯的单人旅程中体验以积累与路径推进为核心的回合制玩法。

items.title: MAGISTAL Demo
items.short_description: MAGISTAL is a strategic board game where you battle by developing units on the board. Units level up in the order that magic energy is accumulated! Move your units and attack your opponent with arts. The first to destroy a certain number of your opponent's units wins!

items.title: Interstellar Inn Demo
items.short_description: Interstellar Inn is a 2D hotel building and management sim in space. - DEMO -

items.title: How To Destroy A City Demo
items.short_description: 《How to Destroy a City》是一款休闲的增量放置类游戏，你将驾驶巨型机甲摧毁城市。升级你的机甲，对抗军队，并解锁特殊能力和全新机甲。是时候将城市化为灰烬了！

items.title: 修真幸存者 Demo
items.short_description: 修真幸存者 DEMO

items.title: Swap lives（换命）
items.short_description: 取材自《聊斋志异》的中式悬疑解谜游戏。 古江南水乡中，朱夫人与吴家小姐因一场神秘交易卷入生死迷局。你将在双视角间切换，收集线索、破解谜题，揭开人鬼阴谋的真相，助她们挣脱命运枷锁，完成自我救赎。 游戏以传统美学营造沉浸式悬疑氛围，谜题与叙事深度绑定，带你体验一场关于人性与救赎的情感之旅。

items.title: Baccarat Strada: Ultimate Baccarat Punto Banco Simulator & Trainer
items.short_description: Master baccarat the way it's actually played in Macau. Four variants — Standard, Fast, Thunder, Easy. Five traditional roads. Card squeeze, side bets, autoplay, full stats. One purchase, yours forever — no DLC, no subscriptions, no ads. Less than a single casino bet.

items.title: Alchemist Demo
items.short_description: - 款以魔法为核心的动作角色扮演游戏，研究与炼金术将引导你穿越战斗、谜题和遍布各地的挑战。

items.title: Bad Football
items.short_description: 专为拆散友情打造的街机足球游戏。快节奏、够暴力、没王法。从 48 支国家队中挑一支捧起 Worst Cup，或在本地 1v1 里把好友打到怀疑人生。

items.title: Pawns Revenge Demo
items.short_description: The rules on the chessboard have changed! Start as a single pawn, gather roguelike abilities, and take your revenge on the Queen by defeating powerful pieces. Plan your moves wisely, it's your turn to checkmate!

items.title: Nova Swarm
items.short_description: 一款快节奏街机射击高分挑战游戏：躲开清晰可读的虫群，每关击破一个 Boss，争夺混乱的奖励核心，然后立刻再开一局。

items.title: Space Wander Navigator Project Demo
items.short_description: 《领航员计划》是一个有美少女养成互动要素的双摇杆飞行射击Rouge弹幕游戏。 武器组合，获取强化，升级舰船，射爆一切！ 养成属于你的美少女领航员！

items.title: 喵喵时光：猫咪的温馨小屋Demo
items.short_description: 《喵喵时光：猫咪的温馨小屋》是一款游戏化专注工具。装扮一间温馨的小房间，养一只可爱的小猫咪，用简单实用的工具来提高工作效率。与可爱的小猫一起度过这段美好时光吧！与猫咪相处的越久会有更多的惊喜。

items.title: 寻踪梵高：画中喵 Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到梵高的艺术世界！调皮的猫咪们，已在旋转的星空与金色的向日葵花海间，为你藏好了一场可爱的冒险。 跟随梵高一次神秘外出的线索，开启这段放松的旅程吧！

items.title: 我的傲娇妹妹 MY TSUNDERE SISTER Demo
items.short_description: 《我的高冷女友》续作来袭！与红发双马尾傲娇妹妹同住一屋，体验嘴硬心软的日常守护，解锁夏日限定的甜蜜与感动。DEMO包含最初的约20分钟市场的剧情体验，期待您的试玩！

items.title: Echoes of Sin: Confusion
items.short_description: Echoes of Sin: Confusion 是一款以循环结构为基础的第一人称心理恐怖游戏，每位玩家所经历的循环各不相同。在随机出现的异常现象中存活将开启新的可能，但也将失去其他机会。

items.title: Escape Line
items.short_description: 病娇·人外·乙女·哲学·科幻·视觉小说 你遭遇海难，失去记忆，醒来后发现自己身处一座被迷雾笼罩的荒岛 除了两只塞壬的帮助，你一无所有——那么，代价是什么？

items.title: 凡灵百态训练篇
items.short_description: 凡灵百态训练篇 多年苦修，只为等待那场决定命运的皇都大考。这场试炼，不考术法高低，只考你对“人”之一字的领悟深浅。你已准备妥当，却在马上考场的最后一刻……突生异变，眼前金光骤然扭曲成无尽的灰雾。规则混沌，身份错乱，所见之人皆为虚妄，又似藏着某种真实。你仍需要面对百官、平民、商贾、僧道……但他们的言语暗藏，他们的喜怒皆为利刃。你的一举一动，不再是答题，而是解救。

items.title: Universe X
items.short_description: A sci-fi RPG strategy game where you build fleet, attack, trade and explore space. You can fight yourself, have others help you and upgrade your ship or buy plethora of ships for your space garage.

items.title: 春 : 献祭仪式
items.short_description: 深受亡妹“春(Haru)”的恶梦折磨，主角孤身前往一座偏远村庄寻找真相。在这里，他必须履行一场诡异的“五日祭祀 request 仪式”。在令人毛骨悚然的的规则下探索村庄，并直面真相。但请记住：你绝对无法活着度过最后一天。

potential_items.title: 失落城堡2
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 6,873 篇用户评测中有 77% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
potential_items.short_description: 失落城堡2是一款2D卡通横版Rogue-Lite游戏。探寻丰富宝物道具强化自己，精通各类武器玩出花样，挑战强大魔物展现实力。新的冒险正召唤着宝藏猎人们！

potential_items.title: Wool at the Gates
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一款极简风格的基地战术防御游戏。你将扮演英雄亲自战斗，指挥单位，并创造强大的“职业”协同效果，在不断强化城市的同时，抵御无尽入侵的羊群浪潮。

potential_items.title: Apocalypse Express
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 154 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在后末日的背景中，抵御敌人无休止的进攻浪潮，对你的火车进行控制、升级和修理。在这款动作策略类肉鸽游戏中，玩家决定踏上穿越荒原的旅程，以期实现亲眼看一看外界遗迹的梦想。

potential_items.title: Fears to Fathom® - Scratch Creek
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 577 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在注意到与《Fears to Fathom》某个篇章有毛骨悚然的相似之处后，泰莎与马库斯决定分享他们自己的经历。斯克拉奇溪仅支持线上双人合作模式。

potential_items.title: 时空迷踪
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
